name: Zesty Italian Chicken (Microwave)
recipeIngredient: 1 Green pepper, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the margarine or butter and sage in a 12 x 7 x 2-inch microwave-safe baking dish.
2. Cook, uncovered, on HIGH for 30 to 60 seconds.
3. Rinse chicken and pat dry. Add to dish, turning once to coat well.
4. Add green pepper and mushrooms. Cover with vented microwave-safe plastic wrap.
5. Cook on HIGH for 8 to 10 minutes or until chicken is tender and no longer pink, turning chicken over and rearranging once.
6. Remove chicken and vegetables from the dish with a slotted spoon.
7. Stir tomato sauce, oregano, garlic powder, and lemon pepper into the drippings in the pan.
8. Cook, covered, on HIGH until hot and bubbly, about 3 to 4 minutes.
9. Wrap each piece of chicken with a cheese slice, then a ham slice.
10. Place in dish on top of sauce.
11. Top with cooked vegetables. Cover again.
12. Cook on HIGH for 3 to 5 minutes until heated through, giving the dish a half-turn once.
13. Serve with hot cooked rice or spaghetti.
Makes 6 servings.
NUTRITION INFORMATION PER SERVING
Calories: 466
Protein: 44 g
Carbohydrates: 34 g
Fat: 17 g
Cholesterol: 113 mg
Sodium: 952 mg
Fiber: 3 g
